  • or is an invalid value for the dNSName field of an X.509 certificate. @@ -572,0 +568,8 @@ + // Is it a valid dNSName? + try { + new DNSName(hostname); + } catch (IOException ioe) { + throw new IllegalArgumentException( + "Server name value of host_name must be a valid DNSName", ioe); + } +
